contract_mismatch_patterns: optional evidence_link_map treated as required by downstream reviewers
non-uniform failure classification field names across run bundles
evidence_linkage_deficiencies: missing deterministic join key between replay_result and review_result in two runs
invariant_gap_observations: no invariant currently requires minimum evidence-link coverage ratio
no invariant enforces stable test evidence schema across runs
command_shape_weakness_observations: test evidence command provenance is not normalized before aggregation
